name: xbox-360-companion
description: Xbox 360 Companion — Go backend + Electron desktop app

scripts.build:server:mac: mkdir -p dist && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-mac . && node scripts/verify-go-binaries.js darwin-amd64
scripts.build:server:mac:arm: mkdir -p dist && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-mac . && node scripts/verify-go-binaries.js darwin-arm64
scripts.build:server:linux: mkdir -p dist && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-linux-x64 . && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-linux-arm64 . && node scripts/verify-go-binaries.js linux
scripts.build:server:linux:x64: mkdir -p dist && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-linux-x64 . && node scripts/verify-go-binaries.js linux-amd64
scripts.build:server:linux:arm64: mkdir -p dist && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -C src/server -o ../../dist/godsend-linux-arm64 . && node scripts/verify-go-binaries.js linux-arm64
scripts.build:win: npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:server:mac && npm run build:electron:mac
scripts.build:mac:arm: npm run build:server:mac:arm && npm run build:electron:mac:arm
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:server:linux && npm run build:electron:linux
